title: cQED Study State
description: Schema for study_state.json — the machine-readable single source of truth for a study's lifecycle state.

study_name.description: Folder name of the study under studies/.

objective.description: One-paragraph description of the study's research objective.

problem_class.description: Problem classification(s): OPT=Parameter Optimization, REP=Result Reproduction, DES=Experiment Design, ANA=System Analysis.

status.description: Current lifecycle phase of the study.

loop_iteration.description: Current iteration of the research loop (0 = initial, increments on each review cycle).

science_directive_version.description: Version of the SCIENCE_DIRECTIVE.md driving the current iteration.

completed_tasks.description: Human-readable list of completed research tasks.

failed_tasks.description: Tasks that were attempted but failed, with reason.

pending_tasks.description: Tasks remaining to be done in the current iteration.

blocked_tasks.description: Tasks blocked by external factors (cqed_sim gaps, compute limits, etc.).

key_results.description: Machine-readable summary of headline results (fidelities, verified quantities, comparison metrics). Structure varies by study.

review_history.description: History of review decisions across iterations.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the study was initialized.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state update.
